browse.title: Discover available resources
browse.subtitle: Search by text, refine with category and modality filters, and browse what people have to offer nearby.
browse.sortDescription: Current ranking mixes closeness (50%), freshness (30%), and sooner expiry (20%).
browse.searchPlaceholder: Try title, description, or creator name
browse.locationFallbackStatus: Using account or Tournai fallback when no explicit coordinates are provided.
browse.locationBrowserStatus: Browser coordinates are available as a fallback when account coordinates are unavailable.
browse.empty: No active resources match the current filters right now.

form.title: Resource editor
form.intensityHelper: Choose the same intensity scale used for needs.
form.imageUrlsHelper: Optional. Paste one or more image URLs separated by commas or new lines.
form.locationHelper: Shown to nearby people when they browse.
form.categoriesHelper: Choose from the fixed system-provided category list derived from the legacy product.
form.expiresAtHelper: Leave empty to keep the resource permanent.
form.subtitle: Share an object or service nearby. The optional token amount is only a negotiable starting point.
form.notFound: This resource was not found or is no longer accessible.

imageUpload.title: Images
imageUpload.cropHint: Draw a square crop area on the image
imageUpload.fileFormatError: File not recognised as an image. Use PNG, JPEG, GIF or WebP.

manage.title: My resources
manage.subtitle: Your resources are shown with the most recently modified items first.
manage.empty: You have not published any resources yet.

deleteDialog.title: Delete resource?
deleteDialog.body: This will archive "{{title}}" from active listings.

detail.notAvailable: This resource is no longer available.
detail.creatorHint: This is your resource. You can edit it and follow incoming bids from your bids workspace.
detail.bidderHint: You can make or update one bid on this resource while it remains active.
detail.signInHint: Sign in if you want to make a bid on this resource.
detail.inactiveWarning: This resource is currently inactive and cannot accept new bids.
detail.expiredWarning: This resource has expired and is no longer accepting new bids.
detail.noImageYet: No image provided for this resource yet.
detail.existingBidHint: You already have a {{status}} bid on this resource.
detail.receivedBidsHint: You have received bids on this resource.
detail.notAcceptingBids: This resource is not accepting new bids.
detail.noBidsYet: No bids have arrived for this resource yet.

bidDialog.invalidTokenAmount: Please enter a positive whole number for the token amount, or leave it empty.
bidDialog.alreadyAccepted: Your bid has already been accepted for this resource.
bidDialog.respondingToPrefix: You are making a bid on
bidDialog.respondingToSuffix: Add a short note and optionally propose a token amount.
bidDialog.optionalMessagePlaceholder: Describe your availability, what you can offer, or any coordination details.
